hero.badge: First 100 appointments free — no card required
hero.subtitle: Easy appointment booking for your business — every location, every service, online or onsite. Set up in five minutes and let customers book in seconds.

features.heading: Everything you need to take bookings
features.subheading: One simple tool to connect your business with the people who matter most.

multiLocation.title: Multi-location
multiLocation.description: Manage bookings across every branch from a single, unified calendar.

multiService.title: Multi-service
multiService.description: Offer any number of services, each with its own duration and team.

individualGroup.title: Individual & group
individualGroup.description: Take one-on-one appointments or fill group sessions with ease.

onlineOnsite.title: Online or onsite
onlineOnsite.description: Host virtual meetings or in-person visits — your customers choose.

reminders.title: Automatic reminders
reminders.description: Cut no-shows with timely reminders sent to every customer.

onboarding.title: 5-minute onboarding
onboarding.description: Set up your locations, services and team and start taking bookings today.

footer.copyright: Uponco. Your digital bridge to your customers.
